content.en:
The Lord of the Wind Fang broke through to become the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, and the news naturally spread throughout the entire Eternal Realm.

If it was in the Reincarnation Domain, the birth of an Origin Upper Realm Overlord would simply not make a splash, after all, there were too many Origin Upper Realm Overlords there.

But in the land of eternity, a Origin Upper Realm Overlord is incomparably noble and rare.

......

Ancient Heavenly Palace.

The Desolate Blood Ancestor and the other Origin Upper Realm overlords were also slightly shocked when they heard the news.

"The Lord of the Wind Fangs has broken through and become the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm???"

In their opinion, the Lord of the Wind Teeth was undoubtedly an ordinary Origin Upper Realm, and he had cultivated for countless years, and he was ordinary enough to become the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm.

Obviously, if the Lord of the Wind Teeth relied on himself, he would definitely not be able to break through.

"It must have been the Endless Lord who helped him break through!"

The Wild Blood Ancestor and the other Origin Upper Realm Overlords thought to themselves.

And many Heavenly Ancestors who were trapped in the peak realm of the Origin Upper Realm, after learning the news, they were envious and jealous one by one.

After all, they have been trapped in this realm for countless years, and they have no way to break through, and the Lord of the Wind Teeth was originally just an ordinary Origin Upper Realm Overlord, but fortunately recruited an Endless Lord, and now he has been cultivated by the Endless Lord, and he has easily become the Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

And what shocked many forces and many Origin Upper Realm Overlords was still to come, not long after the Lord of Wind and Teeth broke through, the Lord of Ice and Rain also broke through to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm.

After that, the lord of the white capital, they were.

Of course.

Several other shore-level geniuses born from the human race were also about to break through to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord realm with the help of Ye Tian.

And Ye Tian's son, Ye Xingchen, not only broke through to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm long ago, but now he has been promoted to the current limit and is about to complete the first balance.

To this end, he has devoted countless resources to complete the first balance for his son.

Once the first balance breakthrough is completed, the strength will be comparable to the fourth awakening of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

The Fourth Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord is placed on the other side of eternity, and it is also a very powerful Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

Another period of time has passed.

Ye Xingchen finally completed a breakthrough with Ye Tian's full assistance, and became the first balanced Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and his strength reached the fourth awakening of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord's combat power.

Before you know it, tens of millions of primeval years have passed.

At this time.

Tianshan Pavilion has become a behemoth, a real overlord-level force.

"Tianshan Pavilion has given birth to eleven Origin Upper Realm Overlords, which is very good!"

Ye Tian was pleased.

In terms of the number of Origin Upper Realm Overlords, Tianshan Pavilion is enough to match other overlord-level forces, and Tianshan Pavilion is comparable to the accumulation of those overlord-level endless years in such a short period of time, how terrifying is this!

If hundreds of millions of primeval epochs passed, the number of Origin Upper Realm Overlords would definitely double or even more.

In fact, what restricts the number of Heavenly Mountain Pavilion Origin Upper Realm Overlords is not resources, but the number of Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

Many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors are generally talented, even if they are given a lot of resources to assist, their growth rate is very slow, they can't be cultivated at all costs, in that case, they will only raise a group of waste.

Although Ye Tian has given a lot of resources to cultivate, if they want to get more resources, they still have to make some contributions, otherwise they are not eligible to obtain those resource treasures.

Of course.

The Tianshan Pavilion is now gradually recruiting other shore-level geniuses from some other domains, coupled with the fact that the human race is gradually giving birth to some other-level geniuses, so that the number of Tianshan Pavilion members is still increasing rapidly.

At that time, the number of Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors will also increase, and more Origin Upper Realm Overlords can be cultivated.

Anyway, in the land of eternity, other forces could not restrict the growth of Tianshan Pavilion, just because Tianshan Pavilion had Ye Tian, the Endless Lord.

......

Reincarnation of the ancient mountain.

Ye Tian's Aochen copy body was also about to be raised to the limit of the fourth balance under the cultivation of many resources.

He didn't provide too many resources for this replica body, but he couldn't stand the reincarnation celestial clan constantly giving him resources to cultivate him!

In desperation, he can only cultivate and improve his cultivation, and his strength cannot be improved or not.

"My Ao Chen's copy body has awakened two reincarnation supreme powers, and the reincarnation heavenly clan attaches great importance to it, and it really wants to cultivate me to the level of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors!" Ye Tian muttered.

This is also the reincarnation of the Heavenly Clan has two major enemies, the Reincarnation Source Clan and the Reincarnation Clan, if there is no enemy, the Reincarnation Celestial Clan will not cultivate him!

Another period of time has passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian's cultivation of the Aochen Replica Body has completely reached the limit of the fourth balance, and he can impact the fifth balance, once the breakthrough is successful, then the strength of this Aochen Replica Body will once again surpass the real body Replica Body.

But.

It was not easy to break through the fifth balance, but when he learned that Ye Tian was going to break through the bottleneck, the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan was also helping him, and all kinds of resources to assist in the breakthrough were taken out.

And Ye Tian also took out a reincarnation supreme fruit for auxiliary impact, and it took about 100,000 primeval epochs to successfully break the shackles and be promoted to the fifth balance, making the bloodline of the reincarnation celestial clan complete the five awakenings.

Rumble!!!!

Endless energy poured into Ye Tian's body, causing his aura strength to skyrocket.

After a long time, this transformation was completed.

"Yes, this Ao Chen's copy body is also the fifth balance realm, and it has mastered two reincarnation supreme powers, as well as many secret treasures and reincarnation treasures, and its strength is much stronger than the real body copy body. "

Ye Tian said excitedly.

However, he was still too weak compared to the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, and he had to continue to work hard to improve his strength.

......

Reincarnation in the depths of the ancient mountains.

Yazu, Junzu, Trout Ancestor, and many other Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords were all meeting here, and at this moment, their faces were solemn.

"Does the ancestor of the reincarnation origin clan really want to impact the higher realm?"

Yazu asked.

"According to our information, the ancestor is indeed going to impact the higher realm, and it is only in the near future. At present, one of the nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Universe Source Clan has all gone out and blocked everywhere. And let an area go out so that the ancestor can break through, so as not to affect other members of the universe source clan. Trout said.

Jun Zu frowned: "Do you really want to fight? They also have a lot of nine awakening Origin Origin Upper Realm Overlords who failed to attack and died, and none of them have succeeded in breaking through at present, even the original invincible Origin Ancestor has also failed to break through." Is the ancestor sure? If he fails, he will also die, and no treasure can save his life!"
